HERO.HEADLINE: The Future of Driving is Green
HERO.SUBHEADLINE: Discover BYD — the world's leading electric vehicle manufacturer. Innovation, sustainability, and performance in every drive.

ABOUT.HEADLINE: Why GreenDrive?
ABOUT.BODY: At GreenDrive, we believe the transition to electric mobility should be exciting, not intimidating. We showcase BYD's complete lineup — from compact city cars to premium SUVs — helping you find the perfect electric vehicle for your lifestyle. Whether you're a first-time EV buyer or a seasoned electric driver, we're here to guide your journey.
ABOUT.CARD_1_TEXT: Every BYD vehicle is designed with sustainability at its core — from battery production to end-of-life recycling.
ABOUT.CARD_2_TEXT: BYD's proprietary Blade Battery sets the industry standard for safety, passing the nail penetration test that conventional lithium-ion batteries cannot.
ABOUT.CARD_3_TEXT: Premium features, cutting-edge technology, and exceptional build quality — all at a price point that makes electric driving accessible.

WHY_BYD.HEADLINE: Why BYD?
WHY_BYD.ITEM_1_BODY: BYD has surpassed Tesla as the world's largest electric vehicle manufacturer by sales volume. With decades of battery expertise and vertical integration, BYD controls the entire supply chain — from raw materials to finished vehicles.
WHY_BYD.ITEM_2_BODY: From the revolutionary Blade Battery to the cutting-edge e-Platform 3.0, BYD invests heavily in R&D. The result: vehicles that lead in safety ratings, efficiency, and driving dynamics.
WHY_BYD.ITEM_3_BODY: BYD vehicles sold in Europe meet the highest safety and quality standards. With a growing network of service centers and a comprehensive warranty program, owning a BYD is worry-free.

TESTIMONIALS.HEADLINE: What Our Customers Say
TESTIMONIALS.MARCUS_QUOTE: The Seal exceeded every expectation. The acceleration is breathtaking, and the range easily handles my daily commute with plenty to spare.
TESTIMONIALS.SOPHIE_QUOTE: Perfect city car. Nimble, efficient, and the interior quality is surprisingly premium for the price point.
TESTIMONIALS.THOMAS_QUOTE: Spacious, comfortable, and packed with tech. The rotating infotainment screen is a real conversation starter.
TESTIMONIALS.ELENA_QUOTE: We needed a family SUV that didn't compromise on sustainability. The Tang delivers on every front.

CONTACT.HEADLINE: Get in Touch
CONTACT.SUBTEXT: Interested in a BYD vehicle? Reach out to us directly.
